Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 303}It's a good thing she's not the kind of girl who stays out all night...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 303}One of the students who collapsed was in my sister's class...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 303}I guess she was running away from home as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 303}I heard she always hung around those thugs at that one place...[n]{f 1 1}
